scripts.clean: pnpm -r --if-present run clean && rm -rf apps/electron/release apps/electron/resources/server apps/electron/resources/renderer apps/server/release apps/server-node/dist apps/desktop/dist
scripts.dist: pnpm --filter @mini/server-node build && pnpm --filter @mini/desktop build && pnpm --filter @mini/electron run dist
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm --filter @mini/server-node build && pnpm --filter @mini/desktop build && pnpm --filter @mini/electron run dist:mac
scripts.dist:mac:fast: pnpm --filter @mini/server-node build && pnpm --filter @mini/desktop build && pnpm --filter @mini/electron run dist:mac:fast
scripts.dist:win: pnpm --filter @mini/server-node build && pnpm --filter @mini/desktop build && pnpm --filter @mini/electron run dist:win
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm --filter @mini/server-node build && pnpm --filter @mini/desktop build && pnpm --filter @mini/electron run dist:linux
scripts.dist:express: pnpm --filter @mini/server build && pnpm --filter @mini/desktop build && pnpm --filter @mini/electron run dist
